title: L63 - work_service_requests
description: Service invocation requests — demand intake for work factory services (L62). Each request represents a demand for a service to be executed, tracks requester, priority, input payload, and request lifecycle. Fulfilled via service runs (L64).

service_id.description: FK to L62 work_factory_services (RESTRICT on delete). Which service is being requested.

requester_id.description: Polymorphic FK to requester (agent/cp_agent/persona) or external system identifier

project_id.description: FK to L25 projects. Optional project context for this request (helps with cost allocation, access control).

work_unit_id.description: FK to L52 work_execution_units. Optional link to work unit that triggered this request.

input_payload.description: Request input data (must conform to service.input_schema from L62)

requested_at.description: When this request was created (ISO8601 timestamp)

assigned_at.description: When request was assigned to a service instance for execution

completed_at.description: When request completed (successfully or with failure)

cancellation_reason.description: Why this request was cancelled (if status=cancelled)

notes.description: Additional context or metadata for this request
